Entries.sprinton.hurst.Hurst8H.P2/e sprinton.hur: jaunty/-1000 -1000/WoodsmanHurst 15 13 2 farmer 15 20 0 RodneyOBrien? 999 999 2 Otter.Cambria? 999 999 2 ToriLK 999 999 2 Val? 999 999 2 Nora? 999 999 2 Nova.Eli? 999 999 2 Nova.Dylan? 999 999 2 Daine.TPOChoice_Aliyah? 999 999 2 Rosa 999 999 2 Daine.TPOChoice_Dahlia? 999 999 2 FatherJoseph? 999 999 2 MadDog.HashtagBearFam.Sigurd? 999 999 2 MadDog.HashtagBearFam.Sondra? 999 999 2 MadDog.HashtagBearFam.Gunnar? 999 999 2 MadDog.HashtagBearFam.Gudrun? 999 999 2 MadDog.HashtagBearFam.Teren? 999 999 2 AidaSaura? 999 999 2 MaggiSaura? 999 999 2 Aideen 999 999 2 Beatrice 999 999 2 DaleWaede 999 999 2 EdithHart 999 999 2 MichaelHart 999 999 2 Eloise 999 999 2 EthanHart 999 999 2 Jacob 999 999 2 Jade 999 999 2 Jasper 999 999 2 Jessie 999 999 2 JosephineK? 999 999 2 Juliet 999 999 2 LumaJunimo 999 999 2 JunimoWard 999 999 2 OliverK? 999 999 2  Hector? 999 999 0 Coriander? 999 999 0 Dandelion? 999 999 0 Roslin? 999 999 0 MV.Municipal_SheriffBill? 999 999 0/skippable/viewport 15 12 true/advancedMove farmer false 0 -5 4 10/waitForAllStationary/emote WoodsmanHurst 32 false/speak WoodsmanHurst "I have been eagerly awaiting you. May I ask you to join me on a walk? I wish to show you something.$1"/emote farmer 32 false/speak WoodsmanHurst "Wonderful! However, I must do something first."/emote farmer 8 false/animate WoodsmanHurst false true 120 36 37 38 39 40 41 42 43 41 42 43 41 42 43/playSound secret1/pause 4000/stopAnimation WoodsmanHurst 0/emote farmer 16/speak WoodsmanHurst "Perfect. Let us be off!$1"/advancedMove WoodsmanHurst false 1 0 0 2 2 10/waitForAllStationary/advancedMove WoodsmanHurst false 0 8 2 10/advancedMove farmer false 0 8 2 10/waitForAllStationary/viewport -1000 -1000 false false/changeLocation EastScarp_DeepMountains/warp farmer 24 44/faceDirection farmer 1/warp WoodsmanHurst 24 45/{{SpiritWalk_Aliyah}}/beginSimultaneousCommand/stopAdvancedMoves/warp farmer 72 5/warp WoodsmanHurst 71 5/warp DaleWaede 55 36/warp Jacob 31 32/warp Eloise 32 32/faceDirection Jacob 1/faceDirection Eloise 3/warp Jessie 37 52/faceDirection Jessie 0 true/warp Jasper 50 51/warp Aideen 16 51/warp ToriLK 9 62/warp Jade 7 68/warp Rosa 20 102/warp Juliet 21 102/warp JosephineK? 30 102/warp OliverK? 31 102/warp Daine.TPOChoice_Aliyah? 999 999/warp Beatrice 70 118/warp EdithHart 61 113/warp MichaelHart 62 113/warp EthanHart 63 113/endSimultaneousCommand/viewport 64 9 false/{{SpiritWalk_BearFam}}/viewport move 0 3 5000/advancedMove WoodsmanHurst false 0 14 -3 0 0 4 -2 0 3 10/advancedMove farmer false 0 15 -3 0 0 4 -2 0 3 10/faceDirection RodneyOBrien? 1/warp RodneyOBrien? 30 37/speak WoodsmanHurst "I must thank you again for gathering such potent items for me. They were quite invaluable.$1"/emote farmer 32 false/question null " #I'm glad to help a friend!#That's what friends are for!"/pause 300/viewport move -2 2 2000/speak WoodsmanHurst "That is true. I have grown accustomed to longer hair.$1"/emote DaleWaede 32 false/advancedMove WoodsmanHurst false -15 0 3 10/advancedMove farmer false -15 0 3 10/advancedMove RodneyOBrien? false 0 1 11 0 1 10/viewport move -3 0 4000/pause 500//question null "#So are you going to explain yet?#Hurst, what is going on today?"/speak WoodsmanHurst "Like I have told you. I wish to show you something.$1"/pause 250/speak RodneyOBrien "There you are!$4"/emote farmer 8 false/pause 250/question null "#What's up?#Is everything ok?"/emote RodneyOBrien 8 false/pause 250/speak RodneyOBrien "Hurst was telling me about a new way to read the tarot!$1"/pause 250/speak WoodsmanHurst "I merely spoke of the spirits occasionally gifting me with knowledge.$3"/emote RodneyOBrien 32 false/speak RodneyOBrien "We should talk some more! I've been considering which arcana you'd fit into.$3"/emote WoodsmanHurst 32 false/pause 250/speak WoodsmanHurst "I shall visit you another time to discuss then.$1"/emote RodneyOBrien 32 false/advancedMove WoodsmanHurst false 0 1 -2 0 10 0 3 10/advancedMove farmer false 0 1 -2 0 10 0 3 10/warp Nora? 42 49/faceDirection Nora? 0/pause 250/viewport move 0 5 4000/waitForAllStationary/message "Hurst makes several guestures with his hands, causing Nora's eyes to light up in delight. She responds in kind."/pause 250/emote farmer 8 false/quickQuestion #Hurst, you know sign language?#Where'd you learn to speak sign language?#Have you always known how to do that?(break)speak WoodsmanHurst "I learned it after Nora informed me of it. It is proper for one to speak to others in the form they prefer.$1"(break)speak Nora "I gave him a couple tips on how to learn recently! I'm surprised he's gotten so good at it so quick.$3"(break)speak WoodsmanHurst "I learned it rather recently. Such a language is far easier to grasp than the language of the gods.$3"/pause 250/message "Hurst and Nora continue speaking in sign language. A few minutes later, they put their hands down and nod to each other."/speak WoodsmanHurst "My apologies if I caused you to feel bored, I was speaking with Nora about the strange lizards I have seen within Mistgrove.$1"/emote Nora 32 false/pause 250/speak Nora "If you ever go back you should take a picture! I'd love to see if I can track down what family they'd belong to!$4"/emote farmer 32 false/advancedMove false Nora -1 0 0 -5 2 10/warp Otter.Cambria? 25 57/advancedMove farmer false 0 9 -10 0 3 10/advancedMove WoodsmanHurst false 0 9 -10 0 3 10/viewport move -4 2 2000/advancedMove Otter.Cambria false -5 0 1 10/waitForAllStationary/speak Otter.Cambria? "I too am in this episode!$8"/emote WoodsmanHurst 32 true/emote farmer 32 false/message "Hurst leans over to whisper in your ear..."/speak WoodsmanHurst "They often cloak themselves from me, do you see Orchid nearby?$2"/quickQuestion #Yes.#No.(break)speak WoodsmanHurst "May the spirits preserve me.$2"(break)speak WoodsmanHurst "Thank the gods themselves.$1"/emote Otter.Cambria 8 false/speak WoodsmanHurst "Greetings! Did you find the gift I left for you?$1"/pause 250/speak Otter.Cambria "I did! Thanks!$1#$b#How'd you get your hands on a Void Salmon though? I thought you couldn't swim?$1"/speak WoodsmanHurst "I had assistance from Ward. They are quite proficient at swimming.$1"/emote Otter.Cambria 32 false
